---
title: "About the Team"
---

::: {.hero}
## The Team Behind the Simulation

This project is developed by graduate students in the [Energy Graduate Group](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/education/energy-graduate-group/) at the [UC Davis Energy and Efficiency Institute](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/), under the supervision of Professor Alan Jenn.
:::

## The Team

::: {.grid-4}
::: {.quick-card .team-card}
[Faculty Advisor]{.role-badge}

![](assets/team/alan_jenn.jpg){.team-photo}

### Alan Jenn, Ph.D.

**Assistant Professor, Civil and Environmental Engineering**
**Chair, Energy Graduate Group**
**Institute of Transportation Studies**

Research on plug-in electric vehicles: grid integration, technology adoption, ride-hailing electrification, and transportation finance. Developer of the Grid Optimized Operation Dispatch (GOOD) model. Ph.D. Engineering and Public Policy, Carnegie Mellon University. B.S. Engineering Physics, Math, and Astrophysics, UC Berkeley.

[CEE](https://cee.engineering.ucdavis.edu/people/alan-jenn){.btn-pill} [EEI](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/people/alan-jenn/){.btn-pill}
:::

::: {.quick-card .team-card}
[Graduate Researcher]{.role-badge}

![](assets/team/david.jpg){.team-photo}

### David MacDonald

**Master's Student, Energy Graduate Group**

Remote and off-grid power, energy storage, microhydro systems, agrovoltaics, Smart Home technologies, repurposed electronics, passive energy systems, distributed energy infrastructure, environmental design, and energy resilience for emergency preparedness. Software engineer with Apple platform experience (HomeKit, CarPlay). Multiple provisional patents for low-energy mechanical systems.

[EEI Profile](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/people/macdonald-david/){.btn-pill}
:::

::: {.quick-card .team-card}
[Graduate Researcher]{.role-badge}

![](assets/team/miguel.jpg){.team-photo}

### Miguel Craven

**Master's Student, Energy Graduate Group**
**Student Regent, UC Board of Regents**

Renewable energy and biofuels, public policy, energy economics. B.S. Mechanical Engineering, UC Merced, where he served as Student Body President. Undergraduate work spanned electric vehicles, unmanned vehicles, medical assistance devices, and agricultural devices. Advocates for housing access, freedom of expression, and diversity in higher education.

[EEI](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/people/craven-miguel/){.btn-pill} [Regents](https://regents.universityofcalifornia.edu/about/members-and-advisors/bios/miguel-craven.html){.btn-pill}
:::

::: {.quick-card .team-card}
[Graduate Researcher]{.role-badge}

![](assets/team/rayhan.jpg){.team-photo}

### Rayhan Khayrunnas Syarief Moo

**Master's Student, Energy Graduate Group**
**Fulbright Scholar**

Energy efficiency, renewable energy, geothermal, and energy policy. Engineering consultant based in Jakarta. B.S. Mechanical Engineering, Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember, Surabaya. Pursuing graduate studies at UC Davis through the Fulbright Master's Degree Scholarship.

[EEI Profile](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/people/khayrunnas-syarief-moo-rayhan/){.btn-pill}
:::
:::

## And One More Team Member...

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.quick-card .team-card}
![](assets/team/morty.jpg){.team-photo style="object-position: center 35%;"}

### Morty

**Chief Morale Officer**

Morty is the namesake of our sister project, [MortyMonteCarlo](https://dmac716.github.io/MortyMonteCarlo/), which computes the full lifecycle assessment (manufacturing, ingredient sourcing, packaging, retail) for the same dog food products simulated here. A key benefit of that project: we can now reverse-engineer any dog food recipe to its proper ratio and qualitative composition. He takes his role very seriously.
:::
:::

## Acknowledgments

::: {.panel}
This work is supported by the UC Davis Energy Graduate Group and the Institute of Transportation Studies. The distributed compute infrastructure spans Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure, and GitHub Codespaces. Route geometry is provided by the Google Routes API under academic licensing.

The simulation codebase and all artifacts are open source and available on [GitHub](https://github.com/dMac716/coldchain-freight-montecarlo).
:::

---

::: {.banner-row}
[![UC Davis Energy and Efficiency Institute](assets/team/eei_banner.png){style="max-height:60px;"}](https://energy.ucdavis.edu/)
[![UC Davis College of Engineering](assets/team/coe_logo.png){style="max-height:60px;"}](https://engineering.ucdavis.edu/)
:::
